# Soft31 Handoff32 Reserved8 Contract

## Soft 31
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.31 with quality bias floor 0.29 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 32
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.32 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Reserved 8k
reserved context headroom defaults to 8k tokens for denser usable windows before hard block

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
